name: Check of menu bar in LYRASIS
fullName: Menu Bar: Check of menu bar in LYRASIS

steps.name: When  I add 'LYRASIS Reads' account from welcomeScreen
Then  There is a menu bar at the bottom of the screen
And  There are tabs 'Catalog', 'My Books', 'Reservations' and 'Settings' on application screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Check of menu bar in LYRASIS

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Check of menu bar in LYRASIS
